title: Placement Filter Component
description: Sets rules for under what conditions the block can be placed and survive.

conditions.description: List of conditions where the block can be placed/survive. Limited to 64 conditions.

allowed_faces.description: List of describing which face(s) this block can be placed on.

block_filter.description: List of blocks that this block can be placed against in the allowed_faces direction. Limited to 64 blocks.
